{{CargoClone
|name=Ratman
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=174
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Water DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Refine +1 Blue Gaia Material +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Refine +1 Blue Gaia Material +2.5%
|}}
